requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency and Energy Label — NOM-015-ENER

summary.en: Household refrigerators and freezers placed on the Mexican market are assessed under NOM-015-ENER for energy efficiency, test methods, maximum energy consumption limits, and energy-efficiency labelling. Importers must confirm the exact version and scope for the appliance configuration, rated voltage and capacity, then align the Mexican energy label, test report and model family with the NOM certificate or conformity evidence used for import and sale.
summary.zh: 投放墨西哥市场的家用电冰箱和冷冻箱须依据 NOM-015-ENER 评估能效、试验方法、最大耗电量限值及能效标签。进口商须确认器具配置、额定电压和容量对应的适用版本及范围，并使墨西哥能效标签、检测报告和型号系列与进口及销售所用的 NOM 证书或符合性证据一致。
summary.zht: 投放墨西哥市場的家用電冰箱和冷凍箱須依據 NOM-015-ENER 評估能效、試驗方法、最大耗電量限值及能效標籤。進口商須確認器具配置、額定電壓和容量對應的適用版本及範圍，並使墨西哥能效標籤、檢測報告和型號系列與進口及銷售所用的 NOM 證書或符合性證據一致。

standards_or_laws: NOM-015-ENER — Eficiencia energetica de refrigeradores y congeladores electrodomesticos
Mexican energy-efficiency label and test-method requirements for in-scope household refrigerating appliances

summary.en: China-market refrigerators are commonly tested and labelled under GB 12021.2 and the China Energy Label system. That evidence is useful for baseline performance review, but the grade scale, label format, model grouping and test declaration are not Mexican NOM-015-ENER evidence.
summary.zh: 中国市场电冰箱通常依据 GB 12021.2 和中国能效标识制度进行测试和标识。该证据可用于基础性能评审，但等级体系、标签格式、型号分组和测试声明均不是墨西哥 NOM-015-ENER 证据。
summary.zht: 中國市場電冰箱通常依據 GB 12021.2 和中國能效標識制度進行測試和標識。該證據可用於基礎性能評審，但等級體系、標籤格式、型號分組和測試聲明均不是墨西哥 NOM-015-ENER 證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators

gap.en: Do not convert a China Energy Label grade into a Mexico claim. Prepare Mexico-specific NOM-015-ENER test evidence, model-family justification, Spanish energy label artwork, rated-volume data and importer/certificate-holder information before shipment. A high Chinese efficiency grade may still need retesting or recalculation under the Mexican method.
gap.zh: 不要将中国能效等级直接换算为墨西哥声明。出货前应准备墨西哥专用 NOM-015-ENER 测试证据、型号系列说明、西班牙语能效标签稿、额定容积数据以及进口商/证书持有人信息。即使中国能效等级较高，也可能仍需按墨西哥方法重新测试或计算。
gap.zht: 不要將中國能效等級直接換算為墨西哥聲明。出貨前應準備墨西哥專用 NOM-015-ENER 測試證據、型號系列說明、西班牙語能效標籤稿、額定容積數據以及進口商/證書持有人資訊。即使中國能效等級較高，也可能仍需按墨西哥方法重新測試或計算。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the refrigerator or freezer is within NOM-015-ENER scope
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for China domestic sale under Chinese energy-efficiency rules, but not accepted as Mexican NOM-015-ENER compliance

source.publisher: Diario Oficial de la Federacion / CONUEE

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat NOM-015-ENER as a separate Mexican energy gate. GB 12021.2 and China Energy Label files do not replace Mexican testing, labelling, model-family and certificate evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将 NOM-015-ENER 视为独立的墨西哥能效门槛。GB 12021.2 和中国能效标识文件不能替代墨西哥测试、标签、型号系列和证书证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將 NOM-015-ENER 視為獨立的墨西哥能效門檻。GB 12021.2 和中國能效標識文件不能替代墨西哥測試、標籤、型號系列和證書證據。
